. I have encountered countless different guest experiences, completed various projects for the company, and tackled countless watches worldwide having the navigational command and conn. Additionally I have worked as a seasoned Captain on different kind of motor yachts up to 30m.

I am writing this letter to enquire for a possible job opening. I enclose my CV for your information.

I am fascinated with the beauty our oceans and what they have to offer while understanding its importance to the health and future of our planet. I am hoping to find a role involved in marine science and conservation going forward and get involved in a marine research project.

I began my studies and obtained my undergraduate bachelor’s degree in genetics and microbiology from the University of KwaZulu-Natal from 2013 to 2015. I obtained my honours degree in Microbiology from Stellenbosch University in 2016.
Since graduating from honours, I began work at Africa Health Research Institute (AHRI) as a research laboratory technician from June 2017 to February 2020. My work at AHRI as a research lab technician involved a wide variety of roles. As the sole technician working on our research study, I was responsible for all aspects of the operations of the study, from designing and modifying laboratory protocols to carrying out scientific experiments on infectious human clinical samples within a biosafety level 3 environment. The experiments conducted on samples were applications of molecular techniques including phenotypic cell staining and analysis using flow cytometry technology. Data analysis and reporting of results in presentation format was also a large aspect of my job profile. I was also responsible for addressing any issues raised with other departments involved in the study, such as the clinical core, IT, and data as well as the biorepository department.
AHRI is a multidisciplinary, cutting edge independent research institute with the goal of becoming a source of fundamental discoveries into the susceptibility, transmission and cure of HIV, TB and related diseases. AHRI’s major funders are Wellcome Trust and the Howard Hughes Medical Institute, with academic partners in University of KwaZulu-Natal and University College London

The critical thinking abilities I have acquired from my studies and previous work experience, has shaped me into a problem solver. I am service driven. A complete people pleaser in everything I do. Making a difference in other people’s lives is what gets me out of bed in the morning. (And on a side note, I am one of those annoyingly happy morning people).
Most of my life, I have found myself in the customer service industry through sales, marketing, event planning and building customer relationships. Going above and beyond for not only clients, but friends and family alike, is a built-in factory default for me. Excellence is not quite good enough. My long term goal is to return home to complete my Bachelor of Laws degree Cum Laude, but not before I have made my mark in the yachting industry by eventually progressing to a Chief Stewardess. Describe yourself:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Greetings,

With reference to having visited your website,
I would like to take this opportunity in writing to you expressing my interest in applying for the position of a yacht steward (male) or service steward (male) or a yacht butler with your esteemed organisation if you are considering applications from candidates based in India. 

I would like to take this opportunity in mentioning, that I have worked as a butler for about 2 years (June 2008 - May 2010) while working with the ITC Sonar Kolkata - A Luxury Collection Hotel while on an internal transfer within the f&b department of the hotel. During my tenure as a butler, I have had the opportunity in serving several VVIP Clients who have stayed at the hotel such as Bollywood Stars, CEO's/Managing Directors of companies, Sports person's, Politicians etc. 

As part of the duty and responsibilities of a butler I have undertaken, the following responsibilities are just to name a few as you may be familiar with:-

(1) Taking in room check-ins (2) Unpacking and arranging the closet. (3) Shoe cleaning. (4) Explaining the in room facilities and amenities. (5) Demonstrating the safe use of certain in room gadgets. (6) Collection of soiled laundry and delivery of clean laundry. (7) Organising and co-ordinating travel arrangements like the booking of flight tickets, car rentals, payments etc. (8) Organising meetings in the hotels business centre and board rooms and the assistance of AV equipment during meetings with the IT department of the hotel. (9) Organising in suite parties and co-ordinating specific diet orders of the client if any with the chef concerned.(10) Taking f&b orders of the client and his guest if any during his/her stay and serving with the highest standards. (11) Highlighting any issues if any directly to the GM and respective HOD's for prompt action. (12) Arranging appointments at the hotel spa, restaurant reservations in the hotel and outside the hotel as and when requested by the client. (13) Co-ordinating in room departures with the front office to ease the process of the clients departure. Please note these are just a few of the various duties and responsibilities while there are many more that I have performed as a butler.

I am presently working with Fred Olsen Cruise Lines UK as a waiter and I have also worked with P &O Cruises as a fine dining waiter for 4 years. I have alot of experience working with fine dining restaurants (silver service), managing bars, managing wine cellars and inventory of wine and spirits, managing restaurant inventories, training employees and in cashiering duties as well. I have also worked with very busy and fast paced restaurants in my career with the hospitality industry.

I would like to take this opportunity in mentioning, that I am also very comfortable carrying out laundry and cleaning duties that may be required for the position and I am very confident in undertaking what ever other responsibilities come with the position.

Thanking you and I would be extremely grateful to hear from you should my application be considered for employment with your esteemed organisation. Please find attached my CV for your perusal and kind consideration.

Thanking You,

Yours Faithfully,

Jack Maqbul.
